blocks.original_text: He was walking through the crypts beneath Winterfell, as he he had walked a thousand times before. The Kings of Winter watched him pass with eyes of ice, and the direwolves at their feet turned their great stone heads and snarled. Last of all, he came to the tomb where his father slept, with Brandon and Lyanna beside him. “Promise me, Ned,” Lyanna’s statue whispered. She wore a garland of pale blue roses, and her eyes wept blood.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard梦行Winterfell crypts，冰眼kings与stone direwolves注视，Lyanna血泪statue再次要求promise。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 源页确实印作as he he had walked，按原文保留。crypt dream把promise、blue roses与blood tears叠加，预示旧责任再次逼近。
blocks.background_zh: **crypt dream：** Winterfell crypts埋Stark ancestors；Lyanna的promise内容仍未说明，pale blue roses反复与她相连。

blocks.original_text: The royal apartments were in Maegor’s Holdfast, a massive square fortress that nestled in the heart of the Red Keep behind walls twelve feet thick and a dry moat lined with iron spikes, a castle-within-a-castle. Ser Boros Blount guarded the far end of the bridge, white steel armor ghostly in the moonlight. Within, Ned passed two other knights of the Kingsguard; Ser Preston Greenfield stood at the bottom of the steps, and Ser Barristan Selmy waited at the door of the king’s bedchamber. Three men in white cloaks, he thought, remembering, and a strange chill went through him. Ser Barristan’s face was as pale as his armor. Ned had only to look at him to know that something was dreadfully wrong. The royal steward opened the door. “Lord Eddard Stark, the Hand of the King,” he announced.
blocks.explanation_zh: 他经过Maegor’s Holdfast厚墙、spiked moat与三名Kingsguard，想起梦中three white cloaks，并从Barristan脸色知出大事。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 三名现实white cloaks触发Tower of Joy三Kingsguard记忆；相同数字和颜色让Robert危机与Lyanna创伤相连。

blocks.original_text: Fires blazed in the twin hearths at either end of the bedchamber, filling the room with a sullen red glare. The heat within was suffocating. Robert lay across the canopied bed. At the bedside hovered Grand Maester Pycelle, while Lord Renly paced restlessly before the shuttered windows. Servants moved back and forth, feeding logs to the fire and boiling wine. Cersei Lannister sat on the edge of the bed beside her husband. Her hair was tousled, as if from sleep, but there was nothing sleepy in her eyes. They followed Ned as Tomard and Cayn helped him cross the room. He seemed to move very slowly, as if he were still dreaming.

blocks.original_text: They had done what they could to close him up, but it was nowhere near enough. The boar must have been a fearsome thing. It had ripped the king from groin to nipple with its tusks. The wine-soaked bandages that Grand Maester Pycelle had applied were already black with blood, and the smell off the wound was hideous. Ned’s stomach turned. He let the blanket fall.

blocks.original_text: “Ah, fuck you, Ned,” the king said hoarsely. “I killed the bastard, didn’t I?” A lock of matted black hair fell across his eyes as he glared up at Ned. “Ought to do the same for you. Can’t leave a man to hunt in peace. Ser Robar found me. Gregor’s head. Ugly thought. Never told the Hound. Let Cersei surprise him.” His laugh turned into a grunt as a spasm of pain hit him. “Gods have mercy,” he muttered, swallowing his agony. “The girl. Daenerys. Only a child, you were right . . . that’s why, the girl . . . the gods sent the boar . . . sent to punish me . . .” The king coughed, bringing up blood. “Wrong, it was wrong, I . . . only a girl . . . Varys, Littlefinger, even my brother . . . worthless . . . no one to tell me no but you, Ned . . . only you . . . ” He lifted his hand, the gesture pained and feeble. “Paper and ink. There, on the table. Write what I tell you.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Robert仍以杀boar自辩，随后因Daenerys只是child而悔恨，认为boar是gods punishment，并承认只有Eddard敢说no。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert把boar解释为gods punishment是临终道德叙事；他撤回Daenerys命令，却把其他councillors一并称worthless。

blocks.original_text: “This is the will and word of Robert of House Baratheon, the First of his Name, King of the Andals and all the rest—put in the damn titles, you know how it goes. I do hereby command Eddard of House Stark, Lord of Winterfell and Hand of the King, to serve as Lord Regent and Protector of the Realm upon my . . . upon my death . . . to rule in my . . . in my stead, until my son Joffrey does come of age . . . ”

blocks.background_zh: **regency：** monarch未成年时Regent/Protector代行rule；Robert以为Joffrey合法，Eddard知道其并非Robert son。

blocks.original_text: “Robert . . . ” Joffrey is not your son, he wanted to say, but the words would not come. The agony was written too plainly across Robert’s face; he could not hurt him more. So Ned bent his head and wrote, but where the king had said “my son Joffrey,” he scrawled “my heir” instead. The deceit made him feel soiled. The lies we tell for love, he thought. May the gods forgive me. “What else would you have me say?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard不忍临终揭穿Joffrey，私自把my son Joffrey改成my heir，因love之lie感到污秽。
blocks.literary_note_zh: my heir替换my son Joffrey保持文字可指向Stannis，却违背speaker明确用词；Eddard以love实施自己厌恶的deceit。
blocks.background_zh: **文本改写：** Robert口述my son Joffrey，Eddard写my heir；这一差异使will可支持不同succession解释。

He had no taste for these intrigues, and there was no honor in threatening children, and yet . . . if Cersei elected to fight rather than flee, he might well have need of Renly’s hundred swords, and more besides.

blocks.original_text: When Tomard had left him, Lord Eddard Stark sat staring at the flame of the candle that burned beside him on the table. For a moment his grief overwhelmed him. He wanted nothing so much as to seek out the godswood, to kneel before the heart tree and pray for the life of Robert Baratheon, who had been more than a brother to him. Men would whisper afterward that Eddard Stark had betrayed his king’s friendship and disinherited his sons; he could only hope that the gods would know better, and that Robert would learn the truth of it in the land beyond the grave.

The thought of Winterfell brought a wan smile to his face. He wanted to hear Bran’s laughter once more, to go hawking with Robb, to watch Rickon at play. He wanted to drift off to a dreamless sleep in his own bed with his arms wrapped tight around his lady, Catelyn.

blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主张以Joffrey regency换和平与权力，Eddard坚持Stannis；兵力不足迫他请求Littlefinger用gold买City Watch。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: Ned gave him a stony stare. “Have you no shred of honor?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard冷问他是否毫无honor。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主张以Joffrey regency换和平与权力，Eddard坚持Stannis；兵力不足迫他请求Littlefinger用gold买City Watch。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: “Oh, a shred, surely,” Littlefinger replied negligently. “Hear me out. Stannis is no friend of yours, nor of mine. Even his brothers can scarcely stomach him. The man is iron, hard and unyielding. He’ll give us a new Hand and a new council, for a certainty. No doubt he’ll thank you for handing him the crown, but he won’t love you for it. And his ascent will mean war. Stannis cannot rest easy on the throne until Cersei and her bastards are dead. Do you think Lord Tywin will sit idly while his daughter’s head is measured for a spike? Casterly Rock will rise, and not alone. Robert found it in him to pardon men who served King Aerys, so long as they did him fealty. Stannis is less forgiving. He will not have forgotten the siege of Storm’s End, and the Lords Tyrell and Redwyne dare not. Every man who fought beneath the dragon banner or rose with Balon Greyjoy will have good cause to fear. Seat Stannis on the Iron Throne and I promise you, the realm will bleed.
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger称有一点，随后说Stannis刚硬不宽恕、会清洗council并杀Cersei children，引发Tywin、Tyrell、Redwyne等全面war。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger论证不是否认Stannis合法，而是比较outcome：council purge、revenge chains、multi-house war。
blocks.background_zh: **Stannis coalition risk：** Tyrell/Redwyne曾围Storm’s End、Greyjoy曾rebellion；Littlefinger认为Stannis不宽恕会使多家恐惧。

blocks.original_text: “Now look at the other side of the coin. Joffrey is but twelve, and Robert gave you the regency, my lord. You are the Hand of the King and Protector of the Realm. The power is yours, Lord Stark. All you need do is reach out and take it. Make your peace with the Lannisters. Release the Imp. Wed Joffrey to your Sansa. Wed your younger girl to Prince Tommen, and your heir to Myrcella. It will be four years before Joffrey comes of age. By then he will look to you as a second father, and if not, well . . . four years is a good long while, my lord. Long enough to dispose of Lord Stannis. Then, should Joffrey prove troublesome, we can reveal his little secret and put Lord Renly on the throne.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 他提出另一面：让十二岁Joffrey继位、Eddard摄政，与Lannisters和解、三重婚姻结盟，日后可除Stannis甚至再换Renly。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他把四年regency视作捕获state的窗口，婚姻、secret与succession全成为可随时重排的工具。
blocks.background_zh: **Littlefinger alternative：** 保留Joffrey表面合法、Eddard摄政，以多重婚姻绑定Stark–Lannister，并保留未来废立选项。

blocks.original_text: “We?” Ned repeated.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard抓住Littlefinger说we。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主张以Joffrey regency换和平与权力，Eddard坚持Stannis；兵力不足迫他请求Littlefinger用gold买City Watch。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: Littlefinger gave a shrug. “You’ll need someone to share your burdens. I assure you, my price would be modest.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger说Eddard需要分担者，自己价格不高。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主张以Joffrey regency换和平与权力，Eddard坚持Stannis；兵力不足迫他请求Littlefinger用gold买City Watch。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: “Your price.” Ned’s voice was ice. “Lord Baelish, what you suggest is treason.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard称price暴露建议是treason。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主张以Joffrey regency换和平与权力，Eddard坚持Stannis；兵力不足迫他请求Littlefinger用gold买City Watch。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: “Only if we lose.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger答只有失败才叫treason。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Only if we lose把treason定义为victor’s label，彻底拒绝Eddard行为本身有正误的尺度。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: “You forget,” Ned told him. “You forget Jon Arryn. You forget Jory Cassel. And you forget this.” He drew the dagger and laid it on the table between them; a length of dragonbone and Valyrian steel, as sharp as the difference between right and wrong, between true and false, between life and death. “They sent a man to cut my son’s throat, Lord Baelish.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard拿出Valyrian dagger，提醒Jon Arryn、Jory与Bran遭刺，right/wrong不容交易。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dagger as sharp as right/wrong将道德二分物质化；但dagger ownership真相仍未完全解决。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: Littlefinger sighed. “I fear I did forget, my lord. Pray forgive me. For a moment I did not remember that I was talking to a Stark.” His mouth quirked. “So it will be Stannis, and war?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger讽刺自己忘了在同Stark说话，确认选择Stannis便意味着war。
blocks.literary_note_zh: a Stark既赞原则也讽僵硬；Littlefinger准确预测Stannis路线意味着war，却不证明替代路线正当。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: “It is not a choice. Stannis is the heir.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说这不是choice，Stannis是heir。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主张以Joffrey regency换和平与权力，Eddard坚持Stannis；兵力不足迫他请求Littlefinger用gold买City Watch。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: “Far be it from me to dispute the Lord Protector. What would you have of me, then? Not my wisdom, for a certainty.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger退让，问Eddard需要什么，显然不是自己的wisdom。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主张以Joffrey regency换和平与权力，Eddard坚持Stannis；兵力不足迫他请求Littlefinger用gold买City Watch。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: “I shall do my best to forget your . . . wisdom,” Ned said with distaste. “I called you here to ask for the help you promised Catelyn. This is a perilous hour for all of us. Robert has named me Protector, true enough, but in the eyes of the world, Joffrey is still his son and heir. The queen has a dozen knights and a hundred men-at-arms who will do whatever she commands . . . enough to overwhelm what remains of my own household guard. And for all I know, her brother Jaime may be riding for King’s Landing even as we speak, with a Lannister host at his back.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard请求履行对Catelyn承诺：Cersei有百余armed men，自己guard不足，Jaime或正率host返城。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主张以Joffrey regency换和平与权力，Eddard坚持Stannis；兵力不足迫他请求Littlefinger用gold买City Watch。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: “And you without an army.” Littlefinger toyed with the dagger on the table, turning it slowly with a finger. “There is small love lost between Lord Renly and the Lannisters. Bronze Yohn Royce, Ser Balon Swann, Ser Loras, Lady Tanda, the Redwyne twins . . . each of them has a retinue of knights and sworn swords here at court.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger指出Eddard无army，并列Renly、Royce、Swann、Loras等court retinues。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主张以Joffrey regency换和平与权力，Eddard坚持Stannis；兵力不足迫他请求Littlefinger用gold买City Watch。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: “Renly has thirty men in his personal guard, the rest even fewer. It is not enough, even if I could be certain that all of them will choose to give me their allegiance. I must have the gold cloaks. The City Watch is two thousand strong, sworn to defend the castle, the city, and the king’s peace.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说这些仍不足且忠诚不确定，必须获得两千gold cloaks City Watch。
blocks.literary_note_zh: City Watch是唯一可在castle/city尺度压过Cersei household的现成force，关键不在名义 oath而在command loyalty。
blocks.background_zh: **City Watch：** King’s Landing约两千gold cloaks，名义守castle、city、king’s peace，实际command取决于officers与pay。

blocks.original_text: “Ah, but when the queen proclaims one king and the Hand another, whose peace do they protect?” Lord Petyr flicked at the dagger with his finger, setting it spinning in place. Round and round it went, wobbling as it turned. When at last it slowed to a stop, the blade pointed at Littlefinger. “Why, there’s your answer,” he said, smiling. “They follow the man who pays them.” He leaned back and looked Ned full in the face, his grey-green eyes bright with mockery. “You wear your honor like a suit of armor, Stark. You think it keeps you safe, but all it does is weigh you down and make it hard for you to move. Look at you now. You know why you summoned me here. You know what you want to ask me to do. You know it has to be done . . . but it’s not honorable, so the words stick in your throat.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger问queen与Hand各立king时Watch护谁；转动dagger后说他们跟payer，并指Eddard把honor当沉重armor。
blocks.literary_note_zh: spinning dagger先wobble后指向Littlefinger，偶然被他包装成answer；honor-as-armor指出原则提高行动成本，但也忽略原则的保护功能。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: Ned’s neck was rigid with tension. For a moment he was so angry that he did not trust himself to speak.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard因被说中而怒到不敢开口。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Littlefinger主张以Joffrey regency换和平与权力，Eddard坚持Stannis；兵力不足迫他请求Littlefinger用gold买City Watch。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert临终、will歧义、succession合法性、children protection与capital force。

blocks.original_text: Littlefinger laughed. “I ought to make you say it, but that would be cruel . . . so have no fear, my good lord. For the sake of the love I bear for Catelyn, I will go to Janos Slynt this very hour and make certain that the City Watch is yours. Six thousand gold pieces should do it. A third for the Commander, a third for the officers, a third for the men. We might be able to buy them for half that much, but I prefer not to take chances.” Smiling, he plucked up the dagger and offered it to Ned, hilt first.
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger代他说出请求，称为爱Catelyn会花六千gold买通Janos、officers、men，并把dagger柄朝前递回。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 六千gold明确把state force忠诚定价；hilt-first归还dagger表面安全礼貌，却让危险证物掌握在broker手中过。
blocks.background_zh: **Janos Slynt：** City Watch commander；Littlefinger估价六千gold分给commander、officers、men购买支持。
